items.name: Nuclear Winter Masked Man Helmet
items.description: Forged in the fire of pre-war industries, this bulky helmet once shielded mech operators from both shrapnel and the piercing glare of nuclear dawn. Its dome-like LED visor gleams faintly, a ghostly eye watching over the desolation. The faded skull paint, worn by time and sorrow, hints at a legacy of forgotten warriors, their burden carried forward by those who dare to tread the wasteland
